messages.content:
Which of the following is not a valid variable name in Python?
 
 
my_variable

 
 
 _myVariable

 
 
myVariable2

 
 
 2myVariable
What is the output of the following code: print(9 % 2)?
The output of the code print(9 % 2) is 1.

Which Python keyword indicates the start of an if statement?
 
 
start

 
 
if

 
 
elif

 
 
begin
The Python keyword that indicates the start of an if statement is "if".

Which Python keyword is used to create a class?
 
 
object

 
 
define

 
 
function

 
 
class
The Python keyword used to create a class is "class".
What is the output of this code snippet: len("Hello World")?
The output of the code snippet len("Hello World") is 11.

Which of the following data types can a list contain in Python?
 
 
integers

 
 
strings

 
 
boolean

 
 
All of the above
All of the above. A list in Python can contain integers, strings, booleans, and any other data type.

What does the range function do in Python?
 
 
 It generates a range of numbers

 
 
 It checks if a number is within a range

 
 
 It calculates the range of a list of numbers

 
 
Both A and B
Both A and B. The range function in Python generates a sequence of numbers within a specified range. It can also be used to check if a number is within a given range.

What is the keyword used to define a function in Python?
 
 
function

 
 
define

 
 
def

 
 
func
The keyword used to define a function in Python is "def".

What do we use the open() function for in Python?
 
 
To open a webpage

 
 
To open a file

 
 
def

 
 
To open a dictionary
The open() function in Python is used to open a file.
